description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun with a boxy, utilitarian design, reminiscent of the iconic Uzi. The weapon features a short, cylindrical barrel protruding from a rectangular receiver, with a prominent box magazine extending vertically from the grip. The upper receiver has a series of small, round controls and a charging handle, while the rear is fitted with a folding metal stock that curves around the back of the gun. The grip is textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is robust and squared. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with a simple front post and a rear notch, providing basic aiming capability.
description: A compact, black submachine gun with a box magazine, folding metal stock, and simple iron sights. Its design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the vertical box magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding metal stock, charging handle, and the full length of the box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear iron sight notch, the back of the folding stock, and the grip alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, stock hinge, and the magazine release area.
